prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为4641、4761、4775、4484、4451名。2021–2023年位次小幅后移（从4641后移至4775），2024年起明显前移（4484），2025年进一步前移至4451，近两年累计前移约324名，呈回暖趋势；2025年基准位次约4451名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划：2021年88人、2022年94人、2023年94人、2024年94人、2025年102人、2026年102人。2025年较2024年扩招8人，2026年计划与2025年持平，无进一步扩招或缩招，招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国农业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；2024年声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因考生反映招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；但2025年位次已回升至4451，负面舆情影响基本消化。抖音热度总排名第13（评价"高热"），综合热度约387万，主要围绕食堂美食、张雪峰推荐等正面内容，报考关注度较高。2026年声誉文件中未单独列出中国农业大学，未见新的重大负面舆情；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、兽医学、畜牧学、草学、食品科学与工程获评A+，植物保护、生物学获评A，共7个A-及以上学科，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 食品科学与工程类、动物医学类等优势专业社会热度较高；计算机类、电子信息类等工科专业报考热度持续升温。天津市考生总数持续增长：2021年54025人→2025年71938人→2026年约82000人（总人数），竞争逐年加剧。；中国农业大学位于北京市，与天津市相邻，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力。该校在天津招生计划占比较稳定（约88–102人），属于在京985高校中对天津招生规模较大的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：历年位次近两年呈前移回暖趋势；2026年招生计划与2025年持平，无扩招稀释效应；软科排名持续上升提升学校层次认可度；抖音热度高反映报考关注度上升；但天津市考生总数持续增长加剧竞争。在2025年基准位次4451名基础上，预计2026年位次小幅前移约50名，预测最低位次约4401名，波动区间3901–4901名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约4401名，区间3901–4901名。位次在预测区间内（3901–4901名）的考生，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（3901名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（理科试验班类、计算机类等）；位次接近区间上限（4901名附近）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。中国农业大学农林类优势学科实力突出（7个A-及以上），相关专业就业前景稳定，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were 4641, 4761, 4775, 4484, and 4451 respectively. Rankings slightly shifted backward from 2021 to 2023 (from 4641 to 4775), then significantly moved forward from 2024 (4484), and further forward to 4451 in 2025, with a cumulative forward shift of about 324 places in the last two years, showing a recovery trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4451. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin Comprehensive category: 88 students in 2021, 94 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 94 in 2024, 102 in 2025, and 102 in 2026. Compared to 2024, there is an expansion of 8 students in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains the same as 2025, with no further expansion or reduction, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 29th in 2022 → 30th in 2023 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, with continuous improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2024, the reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative', mainly due to candidates reporting poor admissions communication and unreasonable major settings, causing a sharp drop of about 500 places in the admission line; but by 2025, the ranking had recovered to 4451, and the negative impact has been largely absorbed. On Douyin, the overall popularity ranking is 13th (evaluated as 'high heat'), with a comprehensive popularity of about 3.87 million, mainly centered on positive content such as cafeteria food and Zhang Xuefeng's recommendations, indicating high application attention. In the 2026 reputation document, China Agricultural University is not listed separately, and no major new negative public opinion is seen; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Grassland Science, and Food Science and Engineering were rated A+, Plant Protection and Biology were rated A, with a total of 7 disciplines rated A- or above, making the university's agricultural and forestry disciplines top in the country, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Advantageous majors such as Food Science and Engineering, and Veterinary Medicine have high social popularity; engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information are seeing rising application heat. The total number of candidates in Tianjin continues to grow: 54,025 in 2021 → 71,938 in 2025 → approximately 82,000 in 2026 (total number), with competition intensifying year by year. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, adjacent to Tianjin, providing natural geographical appeal to Tianjin candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Tianjin accounts for a relatively stable proportion (about 88–102 students), making it one of the 985 universities in Beijing with a larger enrollment scale for Tianjin.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: historical rankings have shown a forward recovery trend in the last two years; the 2026 enrollment plan is the same as 2025, with no dilution effect from expansion; the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhances the recognition of the university's level; high Douyin popularity reflects increased application attention; but the continuous growth of Tianjin candidates intensifies competition. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4451, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly move forward by about 50 places, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 4401, and a fluctuation range of 3901–4901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 4401, with a range of 3901–4901. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (3901–4901) are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3901) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Class, etc.); candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 4901) should mainly apply for Tier 3 majors, while also considering lower-ranking Tier 2 majors. China Agricultural University's agricultural and forestry advantageous disciplines are outstanding (7 A- or above), and related majors have stable employment prospects, making them worth focusing on.
